text: The new formula of your granola bars tastes way too artificial and sugary compared to last year. Really disappointed. My email is jenna.roberts@example.com if you want to reach out.
Overall happy with the product quality, but the resealable pouch never actually seals properly and the chips go stale in a day.
subject: Packaging feedback

text: I ordered a case of the sparkling water and three of the cans arrived dented and leaking. This is the second time. Please call me at (415) 555-0192. - Marcus Lee
subject: Damaged shipment again

text: Absolutely love the new oat milk creamer! Blends perfectly in my coffee and no weird aftertaste. Best one on the market.
Prices have gone up almost 30% in six months for the same box of cereal. I can't justify buying it anymore, switching to a store brand.
subject: Pricing concerns

text: Your customer service line kept me on hold for 45 minutes and then disconnected. Nobody followed up on my refund request. Contact: sofia_martinez@example.org
subject: No response on refund

text: The protein cookies are decent but I can never find the chocolate flavor in any store near me. Always sold out or not stocked.
Great value for the family-size pack and the kids love the taste. Will keep buying.
subject: Happy customer

text: Found a small piece of plastic in my yogurt cup. Very concerning from a quality standpoint. Reachable at 212-555-0148 or david.kim@example.com.
subject: Foreign object in product

text: New packaging design looks nice but it's impossible to open without scissors. My grandmother gave up entirely.
Taste is fantastic and consistent. Only wish the sugar-free version was easier to find in stores.
subject: Product availability

text: The rewards app charged me twice for one order. Support was actually super helpful and refunded quickly though. Thanks Priya Nair!
subject: Double charge resolved

text: Bought a six-pack and every single bottle had a different fill level. Quality control is clearly slipping.
The flavor is good but the price point is a bit high for the portion size you get. Would buy more if it were cheaper.
subject: Value for money
